text:
Anyone take this?

On Jan 8, 2008 10:43 AM, Razor <bg1tpt@gmail.com> wrote:
> Hi,
>    Thanks for your patch. But it seems that the patch can't patch the
> patch-bindings-Makefile.in in the HEAD of CVS.
>    Here is my patch.
>    Thank you.
>
>
> On Thu, 3 Jan 2008 17:20:07 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> > Maintainer of databases/rrdtool,
> >
> > Please note that PR ports/119310 has just been submitted.
> >
> > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> > and a committer will take care of it.

> > The full text of the PR can be found at:
> >     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/119310
